privileged_info_summary: The task uses NextGen Connect 4.5.0 (open-source integration engine) running in Docker with PostgreSQL 15 for message storage. It requires creating a channel named 'Lab_Results_OBX_Extractor' listening on TCP port 6661 with MLLP framing. The REST API endpoint is https://localhost:8443/api with credentials admin/admin and mandatory X-Requested-With: OpenAPI header. The test data is completely synthetic: a fabricated HL7 ORU^R01 CBC panel message with made-up patient (DOE JANE, MRN123456) and hospital (MEMORIAL_HOSP) data. All LOINC codes in the test message are real and verified (6690-2 for WBC, 789-8 for RBC, 58410-2 for CBC panel, 777-3 for platelets), and reference ranges match standard clinical values. The channel must iterate over 8 OBX segments and write pipe-delimited output to /tmp/lab_results/obx_results.txt inside the container.
